output.summary: Replaced the intermediate .tabs-item-body wrapper approach with an outer wrapper div around each <details> element. The outer wrapper stretches full height on desktop and holds the background color. The <details> element inside uses CSS position:sticky. JavaScript manages the background color on the active wrapper.

changes: Added outer wrapper div: <div class='tabs-item-wrapper md:flex-1 md:rounded-3xl transition-colors'>
Added data-tab-color attribute to wrapper for JS to read per-tab colors
Removed .tabs-item-body intermediate wrapper from revision 2
Moved background/border-radius from <details> to wrapper on desktop
Updated <details> classes: removed md:open:flex md:open:flex-col md:open:flex-1 md:open:bg-accent-lighter
Added to <details>: md:hidden md:open:block md:border-0 md:rounded-3xl md:bg-transparent
Added to <details>: md:overflow-visible md:open:sticky md:open:top-[calc(var(--fixed-elements-height,0px)+2rem)] md:open:p-6
Kept mobile styles on <details>: open:bg-accent open:border-accent, border, rounded-3xl
Removed sticky classes from .tabs-item-inner (details itself is now sticky)
Wrapped <details> in outer div with className='tabs-item-wrapper md:flex-1 md:rounded-3xl transition-colors'
Moved useBlockProps to the wrapper div instead of <details>
Added conditional background on wrapper: bg-accent-lighter when displayOpen is true
Added conditional tabColor class on wrapper when displayOpen and tabColor is set
Removed .tabs-item-body intermediate wrapper
Updated <details> classes to match PHP: removed md:open:flex md:open:flex-col md:open:flex-1 md:open:bg-accent-lighter
Added to <details>: md:hidden md:open:block md:border-0 md:rounded-3xl md:bg-transparent md:overflow-visible md:open:sticky md:open:p-6
Removed sticky classes from .tabs-item-inner
Updated header comment to reflect new wrapper architecture
Changed selector to query wrappers first: const wrappers = Array.from(panelsContainer.querySelectorAll(':scope > .tabs-item-wrapper'))
Map wrappers to details elements: const detailsItems = wrappers.map(w => w.querySelector('.tabs-item'))
Updated selectTab() to set background on active wrapper and remove from others
Added wrapper background management: wrappers.forEach((wrapper, i) => { if (i === index) wrapper.classList.add('bg-accent-lighter'); else wrapper.classList.remove('bg-accent-lighter'); })
Updated setMobileMode() to remove bg-accent-lighter from all wrappers when switching to mobile

warnings: Asset size limit warnings (expected - editor.js 337 KiB, screen entrypoint 374 KiB)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP both have matching outer wrapper structure. The wrapper div wraps the entire <details> element. TSX uses useBlockProps on the wrapper instead of details, and adds bg-accent-lighter conditionally based on displayOpen state to simulate JS behavior in the editor.

domStructure.desktop:
...
...

keyDifferences.fromRevision2: Removed .tabs-item-body intermediate wrapper inside <details>. Now using outer wrapper around <details>.
keyDifferences.backgroundLocation: Background color is on the wrapper div on desktop, not on <details>. JS sets/removes bg-accent-lighter on wrapper.
keyDifferences.stickyElement: The <details> element itself is sticky (md:open:sticky), not an inner element.
keyDifferences.mobileTransparency: Wrapper has no classes on mobile (transparent), all accordion styling is on <details>

jsLogic.wrapperQuery: Query .tabs-item-wrapper elements first, then map to .tabs-item (details) inside each
jsLogic.backgroundManagement: On tab switch, add bg-accent-lighter to active wrapper, remove from others
jsLogic.mobileMode: Remove all bg-accent-lighter classes from wrappers when switching to mobile

fixesApplied.issue: Revision 2 used an intermediate .tabs-item-body wrapper between <details> and content, but user requested outer wrapper approach
fixesApplied.fix: Replaced intermediate wrapper with outer wrapper div around entire <details> element. Wrapper holds background color on desktop, details element is sticky.

testingNotes: Desktop: Verify sticky behavior - details element should stick to top when scrolling long tab content
Desktop: Switch between tabs - verify wrapper background (bg-accent-lighter) appears on active tab only
Desktop: Verify wrapper stretches full height (md:flex-1) and fills the vertical space
Desktop: Verify border-radius appears on wrapper (md:rounded-3xl)
Desktop: Verify padding (p-6) on open details element
Desktop: Verify colored tabs (neon-green, blue, orange, purple) - colors should appear on wrapper on desktop
Mobile: Verify wrapper is transparent (no visual impact)
Mobile: Verify accordion open/close behavior works normally
Mobile: Verify accordion background colors appear on details element, not wrapper
Mobile: Verify no sticky behavior on mobile
Resize: Switch from desktop to mobile - verify wrapper backgrounds are removed
Resize: Switch from mobile to desktop - verify active wrapper gets bg-accent-lighter
Keyboard: Verify ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation still works on desktop
Verify --fixed-elements-height offset works correctly with sticky positioning
